caption:
Apertus is a fully open foundation model developed by the Swiss AI Initiative, collaborating with EPFL and ETH Zurich. It aims to meet EU AI Act requirements while being multilingual, trained on over 1000 languages. 

What do you think about open-source AI? 

Sources: Swiss AI Initiative, EPFL, ETH Zurich

#Apertus #OpenAI #AI #EuropeanUnion #TechInnovation #AIResearch #OpenSource #ArtificialIntelligence #MultilingualAI #AICompliance #SwissAI

slides.headline: APERTUS IS A FULLY OPEN FOUNDATION MODEL FOR SOVEREIGN AI
slides.sub: Here's what you need to know.
slides.image_prompt: A diverse group of researchers collaborating around a table, with laptops and papers filled with data, in a modern office space.

slides.headline: DEVELOPED BY SWISS AI INITIATIVE WITH EPFL AND ETH ZURICH
slides.sub: The collaboration emphasizes transparency in AI development.
slides.image_prompt: A close-up shot of a team working together with a large screen displaying code and data visualization in the background.

slides.headline: COMPLIANT WITH EU AI ACT REQUIREMENTS FOR DATA PRIVACY
slides.sub: Apertus ensures opt-outs and removes personally identifiable information.
slides.image_prompt: An office environment with a digital screen showing compliance metrics and privacy symbols, alongside professionals discussing regulations.

slides.headline: TRAINED ON OVER 1000 LANGUAGES WITH 8B AND 70B PARAMETERS
slides.sub: The model is competitive with top open models available today.
slides.image_prompt: A vibrant scene depicting a world map with language symbols overlay, representing multilingual capabilities in technology.

slides.headline: APERTUS PROVIDES A GLOBAL FOUNDATION FOR AI DEVELOPMENT
slides.sub: Follow @everydayhypehq for daily AI + Tech breakthroughs.
slides.image_prompt: A panoramic view of a futuristic city skyline, symbolizing technological advancement, with people interacting with digital devices.

story.title: Apertus – Open Foundation Model for Sovereign AI
